top_stories.description: Major stories with strategic analysis, split into act_now and watch_this. Always produce exactly 4.

vbc_watch.description: Stories touching value-based care, payment models, risk adjustment, quality measures. Always produce exactly 4.

deal_flow.description: Acquisitions, funding rounds, major partnerships, consulting firm moves, big tech healthcare plays. Always produce exactly 4.

did_you_know.description: General AI capability and release news, not healthcare-specific. Educational tone. Always exactly 2.

global_rules: At least one story must include a risk_angle or contrarian take
At least one top_story must have priority act_now
Every story needs a so_what that answers: why should a health system exec care?
Connect related stories via the connections field when applicable
Include a linkedin_seed with the single most compelling story for a LinkedIn post
